name: photonforge
description: PhotonForge layout, PCell, circuit-design, and MCP-backed documentation guidance for AI coding agents.

interface.shortDescription: AI guidance for PhotonForge PCells, layout routing, LVS, and docs lookup.
interface.longDescription: Use PhotonForge through your AI coding agent for parametric component authoring, technology-aware layout construction, schematic-to-layout routing, and LVS-style verification workflows. Includes tidy3d-mcp for current MCP-backed Flexcompute documentation and API lookup.
defaultPrompt: Help me write a PhotonForge parametric component.
Route this PhotonForge schematic intent into physical layout.
Review this PhotonForge layout for LVS and port-connectivity issues.
